failures.description: The tool call was malformed: it omitted the required item_id and passed product_id as integer 0 instead of the provided string product_id "1968349452".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had all required information by index 2: item_id 2177997696 and product_id 1968349452. The Researcher instead prepared ProductCatalogSearch with {"product_id": 0}, omitting required item_id and using the wrong type/value for product_id. The next step confirms this caused a SchemaError: the tool requires string product_id and item_id.
